description: Authorized approvers for WFG approval gates. Only Telegram user IDs listed here count as decisions; a button press or decision reply from any other ID must be logged and ignored with an alert to the system_ops topic. See consensus plan Section 7 (Approver identity and Managing Member evidence).

test_approvers.name: Test
test_approvers.note: Test fixture ID used by automated tests only. Never valid for production gates; reconciler must reject it when the approval is not a test fixture.

binding_decision_evidence: For GATE_3_STRATEGY, GATE_4_PACKAGE, GATE_5_SUBMIT: the decision row (with telegram_user_id), the approvals/decision-log.md entry, and the decided packet copy in Drive '04 Approvals/' together constitute Managing Member approval evidence.
